BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Unsanitized URL or request parameters can be supplied remotely via standard web requests.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required; common reflected XSS techniques are sufficient.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: The attack does not require authentication if the vulnerable page is publicly reachable.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: A victim must load the crafted URL or page for the injected script to execute.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Injected script executes in the victim’s browser, crossing from server-side control into client-side execution context.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Limited data accessible by default, such as page-level data or non-privileged session information.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Attacker can manipulate rendered content or perform limited actions as the user in the browser.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: The vulnerability does not directly impact system or service availability.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Reflected XSS payloads and exploitation techniques are well-known and reliably exploitable.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Salesforce provides standard encoding and sanitization mechanisms to remediate this issue.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The weakness is well understood, documented, and consistently detected by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability remains remotely exploitable through network-based requests in the target environment.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No additional environmental conditions increase exploitation difficulty.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No privileges are required in the deployed environment to exploit the vulnerability.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: User interaction is still required for the injected script to execute in the browser.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The execution context still crosses trust boundaries from server-side code to client-side execution.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: In this environment, sensitive user data, tokens, or business information may be accessible via the browser context.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Successful exploitation may allow execution of unauthorized actions as the user, impacting business integrity.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No service disruption or denial-of-service impact is expected.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Protection of customer and user data is critical in this environment.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Preventing unauthorized actions and data manipulation is a high priority.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not significantly impacted by this vulnerability class.
